title: Calibration
description:
Calibration

Calibration

In standalone mode, you can only calibrate fixed position cameras, since there is no robot.

Follow these steps to create a fixed camera calibration. See the Vision Guide manuals for more details.

Create a calibration plate with nine targets.

From Vision Guide:

			Create a vision sequence to find the calibration targets.
			Create a calibration that specifies the sequence created above.
			Set the calibration camera orientation to Fixed.
			Run the sequence to verify that the targets are found.

Follow these steps to calibrate a fixed camera in standalone mode:

From Visual Basic:

			Call VCalPoints to execute the fixed camera target dialog.  From here, the operator can enter the coordinates for the calibration plate targets.
			Call VCal to run the calibration.
